title: Nonlinear S-box Design: Minimizing the Walsh Peak of an n-bit Permutation
strategies: trivial affine identity permutation (nonlinearity 0, linearity 2^n = baseline)
seeded multi-restart random-search over permutations, keeping the smallest Walsh peak
algebraic multiplicative-inverse (AES-core) construction over GF(2^n) with 0->0
targeted hill-climbing / genetic swaps on a seeded start to push linearity below the inverse function
